message.content:
@startuml
title Mojaloop transaction: Discovery

actor Alice
participant "DFSP A\n(Payer)" as DFSPA
participant Switch
participant ALS
participant "DFSP B\n(Payee)" as DFSPB
actor Bob

Alice -> DFSPA : I'd like to send $100 to Bob@Somewhere

DFSPA -> Switch : Which DFSP owns Bob@Somewhere?\n(GET /parties)
Switch --> DFSPA : 202 I'll get back to you

activate Switch
Switch -> ALS : Which DFSP owns Bob@Somewhere?
activate ALS
ALS --> Switch : It's DFSP B
deactivate ALS

Switch -> DFSPB : Do you speak for Bob@Somewhere?
activate DFSPB
DFSPB --> Switch : 202: I'll get back to you

DFSPB -> DFSPB : Retrieve customer information for Bob

DFSPB -> Switch : Here's Bob's personal information
Switch --> DFSPB : 200: OK, got it
deactivate DFSPB

Switch -> DFSPA : DFSP A speaks for Bob@Somewhere\nThe customer is Bob.
deactivate Switch

DFSPA --> Switch : 200: OK, got it

DFSPA -> Alice : System reports customer name is Bob.\nIs this right?
Alice --> DFSPA : Yes, it is.

@enduml
